title: Spanish Gambas with Garlic
description: A simple and flavorful Spanish-inspired dish featuring succulent gambas, rich in garlic flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the gambas and cook for 2-3 minutes until pink and slightly charred.
Add the potatoes to the skillet and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes until they start to soften.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top of the dish and sprinkle with salt.
Garnish with parsley and serve immediately.
Cook the potatoes in boiling water until they are tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and add them to the skillet with the gambas and garlic.
Toss the potatoes with the gambas and garlic until they are well combined.
Serve the dish hot, garnished with parsley.
Cook the gambas in boiling water until they are pink and slightly charred, about 2-3 minutes.
Drain the gambas and add them to the skillet with the garlic and potatoes.
